column1: Hey Jett, thanks for your interest in traveling with SpringBreak U by Go Blue Tours. Your personal trip rep, Spiffy, will text shortly with info and details
What's good! It's Spiffy from SpringBreak U here
Which week is your spring break? I'll send over the options and deets
cool i got you, which destination were you lookin to book?
word both are fire for spring break
which school you guys go to?
We are spread out, but Alabama, FAU, and Oneonta
oh bet! i'll def hook it up for you guys
gonna put this info together for you rn, how soon were you lookin to get things booked?
bet! cool if i send this through email? its a little long for text
dope whats the best email for you?
my bad bro, sending right now
just sent that over, lmk if it came through
Bet I got it. How exactly does it worj(
Yeah, also like about ages and such

bet yea so most of our spots are 18+, except the Riu Sante Fe, requires at least 1 person to be 21 per room. And for booking once you guys choose a spot, i can set you up with a personal reservation link
Ok. What are in your opinion the best 5 day spot for us? 14-19 is fine with us or 13-18, and we're all 18+ accept for one kid who's 17
Also the date was wrong on cancun 5 day, how can I change it?
And can you tell us about the cancun and Cabo resorts?
thats just a sample quote, pricing is the same tho for your dates
for your age group i'd roll with cancun tbh, the grand oasis is like the meca for spring break lol
and will that 1 person be 18 by the time of the trip?
Like will he need to be 18
Because he also wants to drink too
ahh I'll ask operations in the am, but chances are he wouldn't be able to come
Okok, but if we get a 4th who's 18 we're good right? One of our boys has a very very low budget but the rest of us not so low.
yea as long as everyone is atleast 18 you're good bro
I don't even know I'll ask him, our budget is probably 1500 all in with flights
oh bet, yea we can make that work with the Grand oasis, it's the best price wise
If my 2 boys can't make it, do you think 2 guys is still fun or not even
yea for sure bro, plenty of people out there to party with lol
yoo Jett checkin in bro, how we feelin about those options so far?
Looking good with the Cancun one, we're just curious though but do you have any pictures or posts of the nightlife and parties?
Can we change the dates to the 13-18th?
yessir, pricing will be the same
and fs you can look us up on instagram or youtube, i'll link you some videos
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Is4RzNfxeZg and here's the booze cruise 10000% recommend it bro
were you guys lookin to lock in those dates?
Is it possible to switch check in to the 13th and leave the 18th?
Let me talk to my boys over the weekend, but we should be good
Yeah update I know it's late, we're ready to move on to the next step whenever. All 4 of us are in and ready to book
13th - 18th Cancun right? I'll send it over in 5
Here we go brotha, all ready to go. Lmk if y'all need any help getting on https://secure.springbreaku.com/site/public/package/5ARSDJM6LH
Does it say anything about the age requirements
It's 18+ for check in, without a guardian
Drinking age is also 18 in Cancun
So since we are all 18+ we are good right?
How's the view from the room?
depends which building you get assigned at the time of the arrival. the front desk determines where the room is assigned based on what they have open from their other check out and check ins
during check in time our onsite staff can help you with requesting a specific building or requesting that youre all next to eachother, on the same floor, etc
were y'all able to get on and secured?
Sounds good! Yeah, two of us are in
Wait, so if we don't pay today I have to re set it up?
The res will clear and be allocated to other reservations. Its not secure without the deposit
We probably won't book for the next few days, do I text you when we want to check out? Will the same link work?
yea brodie just shoot me a text
We all want to sign up now, same dates and everything. Can we use same link and we won't get fees?
yea I left it open for the day, you can hop on it rn
How long do we have to pay? They just want to sign up tn and pay tomorrow
Yea just as soon as possible bro
If tomorrow, the earlier in the day the better
Just so it doesn't get closed down by ops team for other reservations
So basically the down payment makes sure that we're reserved and the final payment means we're on?
deposit is the alley-oop. final payment is the dunk
Do u got insta or smth? My boys aren't fully set on the company and everything and want to verify lol
yea like my personal? or the company
also down to hop on a call
Yeah, when are you free to hop on? Could we do like a zoom
down for a zoom bro. I have a call with another group in 25 so if you want to squeeze it in now we can
Do u hv a personal instagram
I don't think right now is good for all of us, does tonight work
Basically we just wanna run through everything before we finalize payments
yea the earlier the better. what time we thinkin
down to follow the boys just lmk
They're in NY, can we do EST 9:00?
yoyo, did y'all still want to hop on?
Yeah, my bad it's 8:30 here I forgot I'm in a different time zone
All good, are y'all ready now
Send the meet link whenever I'll send it to them
Whenever ur ready would u mind sending your personal
I think sal paid too, did u guys get that
yea I see Sal in there
hey whenever you have a min, if you could have everyone upload their flight info so we can schedule airport transfers
